Every Ben Roethlisberger TD Pass
  • Opponent
  • Season
  • Week
  • Distance
  • Search

Ben Roethlisberger has thrown 454 touchdown passes in his NFL career. Below you will find every single one of them, organized in different ways.

TDs by Opponent

TDs by Season

TDs by Week

Ben Roethlisberger has thrown 34 playoff TDs which is about 7.5 % of his total TDs.

TDs by Receiver

Ben Roethlisberger has connected with Antonio Brown for 78 touchdowns. He's also thrown TDs to 52 other players.

TDs by Distance

If you only count yards gained on passes that went for TDs, Ben Roethlisberger has accumulated 8,695 yards. That's more passing yards than Shaun Hill (8,295) threw in his entire career.
